title: SQL-SI v0.1 — SQL as a Structural Intelligence Backend (CCC, Trajectory, Metric, PDS Integration)
description:
SQL-SI (SQL Structural Intelligence) proposes a new paradigm that extends SQL from a relational query system into a structural intelligence backend. The approach introduces persistent structural objects (such as trajectories, graphs, and Common Concept Core (CCC) patterns), metric-space reasoning, and policy-aware decision layers (PDS) on top of traditional SQL systems.

In current AI pipelines, structured intelligence layers are often bypassed, with models operating directly on tokens or embeddings. SQL-SI restores this missing layer by enabling reusable, verifiable, and metric-comparable structural representations derived from SQL data.

This repository provides a conceptual framework, figure system, and minimal runnable Java prototype demonstrating trajectory extraction, CCC discovery, structural object storage, and comparative analysis against traditional SQL recomputation.

SQL-SI is positioned as a proposal and reference scaffold rather than a complete database system, aiming to bridge database systems and next-generation structural intelligence architectures such as DBM-SI.
